title: ER-to-Relational Mapping Process Flow
description: A visual guide outlining the step-by-step process for converting an Entity-Relationship (ER) model into a relational database schema.
relationships: Map Weak Entities to Tables (with FK)
Convert Relationships to Foreign Keys or New Tables
Handle Multivalued Attributes as New Tables
Implement Hierarchies using chosen method (All-in-One, Horizontal, Vertical)
